title: Fast-Paced, Team-Dependent
pros: Competitive pay/stock and solid benefits, strong company name, newer office spaces depending on location, and decent opportunities for internal transfers and career mobility.
cons: Experience is very team-dependent, expectations are high with limited onboarding/guidance, communication and processes can feel unclear, and parking/office space limitations can be frustrating.

title: Great Company
pros: WLB is good, smart people
cons: Nothing that comes to mind

title: CEO is a rock star, company encourages collaboration
pros: It is a rare company that encourages collaboration across teams. The first principle thinking is encouraged from the top.
cons: Slow climb on career ladder. If you are seeking to cimb up the ladder fast, NVIDIA might not be the ideal place.
